creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Wed, Jul 11, 2001 at 08:48:58AM -0700, Guy Baker wrote:

> We have set hw.ata.wc="1" in /boot/loader.conf which has impoved
> performance but still when extrating a tar archive we are seeing in
> the region of 3,000 files per minute extracted, when on our other
> machine which runs 4.0 we are seeing 10,000 to 15,000 files per
> minute.

What mount options are the FSes mounted with?  Show the output of
mount(8) please.

> The Mother board is Elite D6VAA the disk drives are IBM 5200 spin, ATA66

I assume the other machine has exactly the same hardware specs?

Kris
